content.en:
After breaking through to become the Supreme Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian continued to practice in retreat to stabilize his realm.

Moreover, he had just been promoted to the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and there was still a lot of room for improvement.

For example, his domain body has just been promoted to the supreme domain body, and his cultivation is in the early stage of the supreme domain body, as long as he has the assistance of the ancestral medicine, it is not very difficult for him to improve his cultivation to the peak realm of the supreme domain ancestor, but it will cost a few ancestral medicines.

However, for Ye Tian, if a few ancestral pills can be exchanged for an increase in cultivation and a qualitative change in strength, it is naturally very cost-effective.

As a result, while Ye Tian stabilized the realm, he used the ancestral medicine to refine the strongest domain body, improve the strongest domain power, and constantly improve his own cultivation.

In the time-accelerated environment, Ye Tian continued to refine the ancestral medicine, and the speed of cultivation and improvement was very fast.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian had already refined three ancestral pills, and his cultivation was no longer comparable to the past, and now he had risen to the peak realm of the strongest domain ancestor.

In addition to the soul realm not keeping up, the domain body has reached the peak realm of the supreme domain body, and the domain power has naturally reached the peak realm of the supreme domain power, but the domain body and the domain power are not pure, and the foundation is not very stable, after all, it is the cultivation that has been improved with the help of ancestral medicine, and it will take a long time to refine step by step.

However, Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than in the past.

At the top Domain Ancestor level, Ye Tian's combat power is estimated to reach the second level of the Supreme Domain Ancestor.

But now, Ye Tian's combat power has already surpassed the first grade of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and he has definitely stepped into the strongest list of the Battle Gate.

As for how many places he can rank on the supreme list, and whether he can defeat a supreme domain ancestor like the herring fish domain ancestor, Ye Tian can't say well, after all, he has never fought against these supreme domain ancestors, so he can't judge their strength.

Ye Tian then did not continue to retreat and do penance, but went out of the customs and came to the mansion of the light-clothed saintess.

He was going to return the Jade Pure Bottle to the Light-clothed Holy Maiden, after all, he had promised that he had cultivated to break through to the Supreme Domain Ancestor, so he would return the Jade Pure Bottle to the Light-clothed Holy Maiden, and now he naturally had to keep the contract.

When Ye Tian saw the light-clothed saintess, the light-clothed saintess was very surprised.

"Ten Thousand Laws Domain Ancestor, congratulations on stepping into the Supreme Domain Ancestor realm!"

The light-clothed saint said.

She knew that Ye Tian must have refined the domain body and domain power to the extreme, and only then would he break through to the realm of the strongest domain ancestor.

And how long has it been, Ye Tian has broken through to the Supreme Domain Ancestor Realm, and he has not just broken through, I am afraid that it has been a breakthrough for many years.

Such a terrifying ascension speed is amazing.

Even if she had been cultivating with the Jade Purification Bottle, she would not be able to have such an effect.

She didn't know that Ye Tian had created such a method as the Endless Domain Method, otherwise she wouldn't be surprised.

"Thank you, this is the jade bottle, return it as promised!"

Ye Tian took out the jade net bottle, lifted the confession, and handed it to the light-clothed saintess.

The light-clothed saint took the jade bottle and immediately put it away.

Ye Tian didn't stay long in the residence of the light-clothed saintess, and soon left.

After going back, Ye Tian cultivated the Endless Domain Method as usual, constantly refining his domain body and domain power, and occasionally entered the Soul Saint Realm to refine his soul.

However, now the Soul Saint Realm's refining effect on Ye Tian is relatively average, and it is not as good as the refining effect at the beginning.

After becoming the Supreme Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian found that it was a little easier for him to comprehend and cultivate the Holy Technique.

After all, some very talented Supreme Domain Ancestors can also cultivate a holy skill as an entry, because the soul of the Supreme Domain Ancestor is strong and his comprehension has reached a certain level, and he can forcibly cultivate a holy skill to the entry level.

Ye Tian became a supreme domain body, his comprehension naturally improved, and the difficulty of comprehending the holy technique was naturally reduced.

But even so, it was a little difficult for him to comprehend a holy technique to the extreme level.

In the blink of an eye, some years have passed.

The Herring Fish Domain Ancestor came to find Ye Tian, so Ye Tian let his copy body go to see the Herring Fish Domain Ancestor instead of himself, and the body was still cultivating.

......

"I've seen the herring fish domain ancestor!"

Ye Tian said politely.

The Qingyu Domain Ancestor also felt the change in Ye Tian's strength, and her cultivation was promoted from the top Domain Ancestor to the peak of the strongest Domain Ancestor, and her aura did not know how many times stronger, which actually brought her a trace of pressure.

Obviously, Ye Tian's strength is very strong.

She was not surprised by this.

After all, Ye Tiannai is a saint-endowed person, even if his soul is not strong now, his combat power is definitely not weak.

"I've seen the Ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws Domain!"

Just like the Supreme Domain Ancestor, Ye Tian is no longer a Holy Son.

In the battle of the Battle Gate, only under the strongest is the Holy Son, and the Supreme Domain Ancestor is already considered a high-level of the Battle Gate, but it can only be regarded as an ordinary high-level.

Only the Supreme Domain Ancestor who has been promoted by the Holy Son can be called a high-level, and the average Zhanmen disciple who has been promoted to the Supreme Domain Ancestor is not considered a high-level, and his status is only about the same as that of the Holy Son at the top Domain Ancestor level.

"Herring Fish Domain Ancestor, don't you know what's going on?"

Ye Tian asked.

The Ancestor of the Blue Fish Domain said solemnly: "Not long ago, the Battle Gate passed a message that the Ten Great Holy Gates had a conflict, and the relationship between them was not good, and the attention of the Ten Great Holy Gates was now focused on the Primordial Ancestral Realm, and it seemed that the Primordial Ancestral Realm had given birth to very precious treasures or other opportunities. "

The Primordial Ancestral Realm was the mysterious world where the Holy War was competing for places, and it was also the first Ancestral Realm of the Dark Sacred Realm.

At that time, the Dark Sanctuary was not as powerful as it is now, and there were not even many Superior Domain Ancestors, and that was an era that was endlessly long ago.

But even so, the Primordial Ancestral Realm was still incomparably precious, and it was valued by the Ten Holy Gates, and holy wars were fought again and again for this purpose.

The status of the Primordial Saint Realm is equivalent to the place where the Xuanxu Saint Realm is in the Dao Mountain Realm, and I don't know how many treasures there are in it.

At this time, the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor continued: "In short, many of the combat power of the Ten Great Holy Gates have now entered the Primordial Ancestral Realm. At this time, some holy places and sects are afraid that they will be ready to move. For example, your Xuanxu Saint Realm may attract the greedy eyes of some forces, so you need to be careful at this time! After all, the value of a Saint Realm is very precious, and many strengths like to create chaos, so as to gain benefits in chaos. If you are assassinated, it will inevitably lead to chaos in the Xuanxu Sacred Realm, and many forces will also fight for control of the Xuanxu Sacred Realm! Therefore, the Superior Domain Ancestor of the Battle Gate asked me to remind you, it is better to be careful! However, you have now been promoted to the peak realm of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, which is much safer, but you still need to pay attention to it, there are countless Supreme Domain Ancestors in the Dark Sacred Domain, and some of them are not even weaker than the Holy Gift, maybe even more demonic than the Holy Gift, don't be careless!"

"Thank you for the reminder!"

Ye Tian nodded.
